headline: The Case for Darden Restaurants (DRI) Gets Stronger
summary: Darden Restaurants, Inc. (NYSE:DRI) is among the 8 High-Growth Restaurant Stocks for 2026. Following the company’s Q3 FY 2026 results on March 19, BofA raised its price target to $272 from $262 and maintained a Buy rating, citing slightly better estimates. Driven by healthy trends, the analyst raised the Q4 same-store sales growth projections to […]
